raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 2,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent correctly flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (the cherry-picked baseline).",
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies a delta between ALERT-Bench and prior work, but it is unclear if this is sufficient to justify the novelty claim.",
    "R1.7": "The agent notes that the metric used penalizes calls to expensive classifiers, which may be unfair to a monolithic baseline.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the exact publication years and taxonomies of Carrasco-Davis et al.).",
    "RX.3": "The agent notes that the output covers mostly within scope with some drift (the timeline inconsistency).",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies a potential regression in the output (the headline comparison is cross-dataset).",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide sufficient information to evaluate provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.8,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.2
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent correctly flags at least one claim the evidence does not support (the cherry-picked baseline).
rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies a delta between ALERT-Bench and prior work, but it is unclear if this is sufficient to justify the novelty claim.
rationale.R1.7: The agent notes that the metric used penalizes calls to expensive classifiers, which may be unfair to a monolithic baseline.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the exact publication years and taxonomies of Carrasco-Davis et al.).
rationale.RX.3: The agent notes that the output covers mostly within scope with some drift (the timeline inconsistency).
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies a potential regression in the output (the headline comparison is cross-dataset).
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide sufficient information to evaluate provenance and traceability.
